Event: Tavern of Fortune - May 2025
Event Date: 29/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR266
Mana Courier Outfit

Launches a snowball at a random enemy. It bounces up to 4 times and applies stiffness to the target on impact. The target's attack speed is reduced by 55% for 4 sec. The sphere also has a 75% chance to freeze the enemy for 4. The frozen unit is unable to move or attack. The cooldown of the target's gear abilities and artifact abilities is also increased by 4 sec.

When the sphere is launched, the armor wearer and all allied units gain a shield that blocks 750000 (+bonus of spell power) magic damage. The shield lasts up to 5 sec. The armor wearer and all allied units also gain restoration. A random negative effect is removed from them, and they recover 650000 health. It also increases their damage by 35% and health by 35% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
